topic: Access-control and IDOR gadgets for authorized bug bounty testing

skills_used.name: research-mastery
skills_used.role: v1 foundations and WHY-level artifact rules

skills_used.name: research-hunt-v3
skills_used.role: v3 source hunt and curated link notes

artifacts.title: Access-Control Gadget Foundations
artifacts.focus: Definition, WHY model, behavioral signals before payloading
must_include: Object, property, function, tenant, and workflow boundaries
judge_notes: Foundation pass is intentionally brief; final artifact carries the full practitioner list.

artifacts.title: Scout Brief and Source Index
artifacts.focus: Canonical facts and source coverage for the final artifact
must_include: GraphQL, WebSocket, cache/CDN, REST workflow, tenant isolation sources
judge_notes: Source coverage is enough for the requested artifact; deeper case-study hunt can be added later.

artifacts.title: Access-Control Gadget Artifact
artifacts.focus: Practitioner-ready gadget map, safe chains, and report wording
judge_notes: Covers all user-prioritized surfaces and keeps evidence model canary-only.
